title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
